title: AQ-5 Waveskimmer

{{Quote|These lovely engines of death will hold the rebels at bay until we can get the devastators up an' runnin'!|[[Deppo]], on a group of mass-produced AQ-5 Waveskimmers during the [[Battle of Calamari|siege of Mon Calamari]]|<ref name="DE 6">[[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]]</ref>}}
The '''AQ-5 Waveskimmer''', also known as the '''wave walker''',<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|322|wave walker}}</ref> was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] aquatic light assault vehicle.

==Characteristics==
This 14-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long [[hovercraft]] was designed to glide over the surface of any body of [[Water/Legends|water]]. Based on an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] frame, this vehicle was supported by two sturdy legs which angled down from either side of the cockpit. These flat boom-like spars terminated in a pontoon that allowed the waveskimmer to float on the water's surface. They also featured servomotors that could ensure the craft's [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] could position the pontoons in the same plane as the cockpit and react to the craft's acceleration lifting it off the surface to gain speed.

The waveskimmers could carry [[Aquatic assault stormtrooper|seatroopers]], [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], and cargo, and had a weapons-load consisting of two [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]], two medium [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]], and two light [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] cannons. A single pilot controlled the waveskimmer.

==History==
The AQ-5 Waveskimmer was the first of several aquatic vehicles designed by [[Hydrospeare Corporation|Hydrospeare's]] [[Design Team Beta]], which produced the first prototypes during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. These prototypes were similar to the final product, however they could only achieve a top speed of 90 kmph and did not carry concussion missiles or laser cannons. They required a crew of three, including two gunners.<ref name="AIR" />

The waveskimmers were constructed within the reborn [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] deadly [[World Devastator]]s and were deployed directly into combat on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="DE 6" />
